description_long: This is a detached residential garage with a gable roof covered in gray asphalt shingles. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal blue siding, while the lower portion features a stone veneer base. The front of the garage has a large, single-panel garage door, partially open to reveal a car and a vehicle lift inside. The structure is robust and utilitarian, designed to accommodate at least one vehicle and provide additional storage or workspace. The overall appearance is clean and well-maintained, with no visible windows or side doors.
description: A blue, stone-based detached garage with a gable roof and a large single-panel garage door.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large, partially open garage door, blue siding, stone base, and a car inside.
description_view_1: Top-down rear view highlighting the gray shingled roof and stone base, with no doors or windows visible.
description_view_2: Rear gable view showing blue siding and stone base, with no openings or features except the roof.
description_view_3: Top-down front view emphasizing the roof and stone base, with the garage door not visible.
